用例标题: 项目不对接和不创建schema 特殊查询 验证多次询问后结果返回均一致
步骤:
1. 询问——哪些表的员工id是1
2. 多次询问上述问题
预期:
1. 返回相关查询sql：WITH annotated_columns AS (
SELECT
n.nspname AS schema_name,
c.relname AS table_name,
a.attname AS column_name
FROM
pg_class c
JOIN
pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
JOIN
pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid = c.oid
JOIN
pg_description d ON d.objoid = c.oid AND d.objsubid = a.attnum
WHERE
d.description ILIKE '%员工id%'
AND c.relkind = 'r'
),
sqls AS (
SELECT
'SELECT ''' || schema_name || '.' || table_name || ''' AS table_name FROM '
|| schema_name || '.' || table_name || ' WHERE ' || column_name || ' = 1 LIMIT 1'
AS sql_text
FROM annotated_columns
),
results AS (
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
(xpath('//text()', query_to_xml(sql_text, false, true, '')))[1]::text AS table_name
FROM sqls
) AS sub
WHERE table_name IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT * FROM results;
返回结果：返回当前相关字段及表已进入知识库的表
返回思考过程
2. 返回结果均与上文查询结果一致

STORED AS ORC
DISTRIBUTED BY (号码);
添加表级注释：
COMMENT ON TABLE company IS '公司';
插入数据：
INSERT INTO company

(1,1,1,'dtstack_01',1,'dtstack_01','杭州',1,'杭州袋鼠云',1113),

(3,3,3,'dtstack_03',3,'dtstack_03','湖州',3,'杭州云机',2012),

步骤:
1. 询问——帮我查询表test_oushu_biao1的所有数据
2. 直接在返回的sql框内修改查询sql：SELECT * from test_oushu_biao1 where sale >=9000;
3. 直接在返回的sql框内修改查询sql：select str_length('hello word');
4. 直接在返回的sql框内修改查询sql：select CONCAT('hello','word');
5. 直接在返回的sql框内修改查询sql：WITH recent_sales AS (
SELECT
“号码“,
company_name,
sale,
project_address,
CASE
WHEN sale > 10000 THEN '高销售'
WHEN sale > 5000 THEN '中销售'
ELSE '低销售'
END AS sale_level
FROM company
WHERE sale > 5000
)
6. 直接在返回的sql框内修改查询sql：project_stats AS (
SELECT
project_address,
COUNT(DISTINCT project_no) AS total_projects
FROM company
GROUP BY project_address
)
7. 直接在返回的sql框内修改查询sql：SELECT
r.“号码“ AS id,
r.company_name,
r.sale,
r.sale_level,
p.total_projects,
r.project_address,
LENGTH(r.company_name) AS name_length,
UPPER(r.company_name) AS upper_name,
NOW()::DATE AS current_date,
json_build_object(...) AS json_data
FROM recent_sales r
LEFT JOIN project_stats p ON r.project_address = p.project_address
WHERE r.company_name ~ '^dtstack.*'
ORDER BY r.sale DESC
LIMIT 3 OFFSET 1;

1. 返回相关查询sql：SELECT * from test_oushu_biao1;

4. 返回结果：返回系统函数结果
5. 返回结果：返回筛选出销售额大于 5000 的公司记录，并给每条记录打上“高销售”“中销售”标签
6. 返回结果：返回统计每个项目地址（如“杭州”、“湖州”）下的项目数量
7. 返回结果：返回结果筛选公司名以 dtstack 开头的记录，按销售额排序，跳过最高销售额那一条，取第2~4名，展示信息丰富：项目数、销售等级、名字长度、全大写、当前日期、JSON 格式摘要等

所属模块: /版本迭代测试用例/BatchWork_6.3.6/AI功能迁移至建投/AI—Agent(#8791)
用例标题: 项目对接或创建schema 特殊查询 验证多次询问后结果返回均一致
步骤:
1. 询问——哪些表的员工id是1
2. 多次询问上述问题
预期:
1. 返回相关查询sql：WITH annotated_columns AS (
SELECT
n.nspname AS schema_name,
c.relname AS table_name,
a.attname AS column_name
FROM
pg_class c
JOIN
pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
JOIN
pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid = c.oid
JOIN
pg_description d ON d.objoid = c.oid AND d.objsubid = a.attnum
WHERE
d.description ILIKE '%员工id%'
AND c.relkind = 'r'
),
sqls AS (
SELECT
'SELECT ''' || schema_name || '.' || table_name || ''' AS table_name FROM '
|| schema_name || '.' || table_name || ' WHERE ' || column_name || ' = 1 LIMIT 1'
AS sql_text
FROM annotated_columns
),
results AS (
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
(xpath('//text()', query_to_xml(sql_text, false, true, '')))[1]::text AS table_name
FROM sqls
) AS sub
WHERE table_name IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT * FROM results;
返回结果：返回当前相关字段及表已进入知识库的表
返回思考过程
2. 返回结果均与上文查询结果一致

`号码` BIGINT COMMENT '编号',
`qy_type` SMALLINT COMMENT '类型',
`company_code` BIGINT COMMENT '公司编号',

`project_address` VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '项目地址',
`jz_type` SMALLINT COMMENT '类型名称',
`building_name` VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '建造单位',
`sale` BIGINT COMMENT '销售额'
)
STORED AS ORC
DISTRIBUTED BY (号码);
添加表级注释：
COMMENT ON TABLE company IS '公司';
插入数据：
INSERT INTO company
VALUES
(1,1,1,'dtstack_01',1,'dtstack_01','杭州',1,'杭州袋鼠云',1113),
(2,2,2,'dtstack_02',2,'dtstack_02','杭州',2,'杭州云',14113),
(3,3,3,'dtstack_03',3,'dtstack_03','湖州',3,'杭州云机',2012),
(4,4,4,'dtstack_04',4,'dtstack_04','杭州',4,'杭州袋鼠',9000);
步骤:
1. 询问——帮我查询表test_oushu_biao1的所有数据
2. 直接在返回的sql框内修改查询sql：SELECT * from test_oushu_biao1 where sale >=9000;
3. 直接在返回的sql框内修改查询sql：select str_length('hello word');
4. 直接在返回的sql框内修改查询sql：select CONCAT('hello','word');
5. 直接在返回的sql框内修改查询sql：WITH recent_sales AS (
SELECT
“号码“,
company_name,
sale,
project_address,
CASE
WHEN sale > 10000 THEN '高销售'
WHEN sale > 5000 THEN '中销售'
ELSE '低销售'
END AS sale_level
FROM company
WHERE sale > 5000
)
6. 直接在返回的sql框内修改查询sql：project_stats AS (
SELECT
project_address,
COUNT(DISTINCT project_no) AS total_projects
FROM company
GROUP BY project_address
)
7. 直接在返回的sql框内修改查询sql：SELECT
r.“号码“ AS id,
r.company_name,
r.sale,
r.sale_level,
p.total_projects,
r.project_address,
LENGTH(r.company_name) AS name_length,
UPPER(r.company_name) AS upper_name,
NOW()::DATE AS current_date,
json_build_object(...) AS json_data
FROM recent_sales r
LEFT JOIN project_stats p ON r.project_address = p.project_address
WHERE r.company_name ~ '^dtstack.*'
ORDER BY r.sale DESC
LIMIT 3 OFFSET 1;
预期:
1. 返回相关查询sql：SELECT * from test_oushu_biao1;
返回结果：返回表test_oushu_biao1的所有数据
返回思考过程
2. 返回结果：返回表test_oushu_biao1的所有符合结果的数据
3. 返回结果：返回自定义函数结果
4. 返回结果：返回系统函数结果
5. 返回结果：返回筛选出销售额大于 5000 的公司记录，并给每条记录打上“高销售”“中销售”标签
6. 返回结果：返回统计每个项目地址（如“杭州”、“湖州”）下的项目数量
7. 返回结果：返回结果筛选公司名以 dtstack 开头的记录，按销售额排序，跳过最高销售额那一条，取第2~4名，展示信息丰富：项目数、销售等级、名字长度、全大写、当前日期、JSON 格式摘要等

所属模块: /版本迭代测试用例/BatchWork_6.3.6/EMRFS+S3存储对接适配(#9012)
用例标题: hivesql 数据地图 验证数据地图表详情数据预览功能正常
步骤:
1. 进入【数据开发-周期任务】页面，新建hivesql任务，临时运行，sql脚本如下：DROP TABLE IF EXISTS hivesql_orc_par;CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hivesql_orc_par (    int_col INT,    bigint_col BIGINT,    string_col STRING,    date_col DATE,    timestamp_col TIMESTAMP,    decimal_col DECIMAL(10,2),    array_col ARRAY<STRING>,    map_col MAP<STRING, INT>,    struct_col STRUCT<name:STRING, age:INT>)PARTITIONED BY (span STRING)COMMENT '' STORED AS ORC;INSERT INTO hivesql_orc_par PARTITION (span='20240123')SELECT     1 AS int_col,    10000000001 AS bigint_col,    'Alice' AS string_col,    DATE('2024-01-01') AS date_col,    TIMESTAMP('2024-01-01 10:00:00') AS timestamp_col,    123.45 AS decimal_col,    ARRAY('a', 'b', 'c') AS array_col,    MAP('key1', 1, 'key2', 2) AS map_col,    NAMED_STRUCT('name', 'alice', 'age', 20) AS struct_col;SELECT    int_col,    bigint_col,    string_col,    date_col,    timestamp_col,    decimal_col,    array_col,    map_col,    to_json(struct_col) AS struct_col_jsonFROM hivesql_orc_parWHERE span='20240123';SHOW CREATE TABLE hivesql_orc_par;DESCRIBE FORMATTED hivesql_orc_par;
2. 进入【数据地图-查找数据】页面，进入对应表的详情页，查看【数据预览】
预期:
1. hivesql任务临时运行成功
2. 对应表数据预览正确，与写入的数据一致

所属模块: /版本迭代测试用例/BatchWork_6.3.6/EMRFS+S3存储对接适配(#9012)

前置条件:
表数据->
1）非分区表 -TEXTFILE
2）非分区表-PARQUET
3）非分区表-ORC
步骤:
1. 创建sparksql任务
2. 输入建表语句：DROP TABLE IF EXISTS sparksql_orc;CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sparksql_orc (    int_col INT,    bigint_col BIGINT,    string_col STRING,    date_col DATE,    timestamp_col TIMESTAMP,    decimal_col DECIMAL(10,2),    array_col ARRAY<STRING>,    map_col MAP<STRING, INT>,    struct_col STRUCT<name:STRING, age:INT>)COMMENT '' STORED AS ORC;INSERT INTO sparksql_orcSELECT     1 AS int_col,    10000000001 AS bigint_col,    'Alice' AS string_col,    DATE('2024-01-01') AS date_col,    TIMESTAMP('2024-01-01 10:00:00') AS timestamp_col,    123.45 AS decimal_col,    ARRAY('a', 'b', 'c') AS array_col,    MAP('key1', 1, 'key2', 2) AS map_col,    NAMED_STRUCT('name', 'alice', 'age', 20) AS struct_col;SELECT    int_col,    bigint_col,    string_col,    date_col,    timestamp_col,    decimal_col,    array_col,    map_col,    to_json(struct_col) AS struct_col_jsonFROM sparksql_orc;SHOW CREATE TABLE sparksql_orc;DESCRIBE FORMATTED sparksql_orc;点击格式化-保存
3. 选中上述语句点击语法检查
4. 选中上述语句点击运行
5. 提交并补数据运行上述sparksql任务
6. 【项目管理-项目设置-基本信息】页面绑定目标项目（同租户下的不同项目），发布上述sparksql任务
7. 【项目管理-项目设置-基本信息】页面绑定目标项目（不同租户下的项目），发布上述sparksql任务
预期:
1. 任务创建成功
2. 上述SQL格式化成功
任务更新成功
3. 语法检查成功，结果返回正常
4. 任务运行成功，表结构正常
5. 任务运行成功
6. 任务发布至目标项目成功，在目标项目可正常运行
7. 任务发布至目标项目成功，在目标项目可正常运行
